channel.title: Test Security Feed
channel.description: A test RSS feed for signal-harvester unit tests

item.title: Critical Vulnerability Discovered in Popular Web Framework
item.description: Researchers have disclosed a critical remote code execution vulnerability (CVE-2026-9999, CVSS 9.8) in a widely-deployed web framework. Active exploitation has been confirmed in the wild. Patches are available and immediate upgrade is recommended.

item.title: New Ransomware Group Targets Healthcare Sector
item.description: A newly identified ransomware group has launched a campaign specifically targeting healthcare organizations. Three hospitals have confirmed incidents this week. The group uses double extortion tactics.

item.title: Annual State of Cybersecurity Report 2026
item.description: The annual State of Cybersecurity report finds that phishing remains the top initial access vector for the fifth consecutive year. Overall incident rates decreased slightly compared to 2025 but costs per incident increased 18%.
